name: Drupal
description: Drupal — PHP content management framework with headless JSON:API and GraphQL APIs for enterprise web publishing.

seo.title: Drupal — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Drupal: Drupal — PHP content management framework with headless JSON:API and GraphQL APIs for enterprise web publishing.

when_to_use: Enterprise headless CMS with JSON:API for decoupled frontends
Complex multi-site content management for governments or media
GraphQL content delivery for Gatsby or Next.js frontends
PHP-based CMS for teams needing extreme content flexibility
Building editorial workflows with taxonomy and media management

cons: PHP ecosystem feels dated to some devs
review.verdict: Still a top CMS for complex editorial and government sites, heavy for modern JAMstack projects.
review.best_for: Government, universities, and media with complex editorial workflows
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a lightweight JAMstack-friendly CMS
